markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO and marketing collaboration between Trek Health and GrowthX to support Trek Health's brand growth.](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive SEO strategy and content production at scale (20M words/month), leveraging AI workflows and expert teams](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Trek Health has unique healthcare pricing data that could be leveraged for SEO dominance, but currently has low domain authority (15/100)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX typically works with more established companies; collaboration would be a long-term investment with limited short-term ROI](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Engagement would require significant collaboration and data sharing from Trek Health team](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

## Topics

### Trek Health Overview

  - [\~20-25 employees](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Built price transparency platform gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [No prior focus on SEO; now pivoting to raise brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Seeking to dominate search results for healthcare pricing queries](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities

  - [Full-service content strategy and production](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Experience scaling content for major brands (Reddit, Ramp, Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Publish \~20M words/month across 45 clients](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Expertise in healthcare SEO (e.g., GoodRx analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

### SEO Strategy Approach

  - [Build topical authority clusters (e.g., conditions, drugs, pharmacies)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Scale content thoughtfully, avoiding over-aggressive publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Leverage unique data for programmatic page creation (e.g., by location, procedure type)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Combine content strategy with link building to increase domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Typically 3-month pilot period to start](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Requires significant involvement from Trek Health team](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [GrowthX provides writer, editor, strategist, and managing director expertise](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Currently booked until April 28th due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Investment Considerations

  - [Pricing higher than typical early-stage startup budgets](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Long-term investment; limited short-term ROI expected](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Alternative to expensive paid advertising strategies (e.g., Hims/Hers $400M/year)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Opportunity cost of building in-house team (est. $500k+/year for comparable expertise)](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed timeline and KPI expectations for first 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of client results at 6 and 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Trek Health to conduct internal discussion on timing and budget for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Trek Health to make quick decision on proceeding with collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/RZ_aNTVC1BDwbzMvysYFnohENmLVXpGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
